{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Supply Chain Executive",
  "description": "Ricos Technical Services Nigeria Limited is a Nigerian owned oil and gas service company. Our primary focus is to employ our specialized, technical expertise , products and motivate our team of professionals in contributing positively to the Nigerian Petroleum and Energy main industry in particular and West Africa in general. We are a powerhouse of technology, creativity and expertise. We possess unrivalled problem solving pro?ciency and acumen in the Petroleum industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Supply Chain Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Identify and track tender opportunities on NIPEX and other procurement platforms.
	Prepare and coordinate technical and commercial bid submissions, including double-envelope tenders.
	Review RFQs, RFPs, and ITTs and ensure compliance with submission requirements.
	Manage vendor sourcing, quotation analysis, and purchase order processes.
	Coordinate procurement logistics and supplier deliveries to meet project timelines.
	Maintain tender registers, vendor databases, and procurement records.
	Support tendering and procurement activities for projects involving IOCs and NOCs (e.g., Shell, Total Energies, ExxonMobil, Chevron, NNPC).


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Supply Chain, Procurement, Logistics, or a related field.
	4&ndash;5 years experience in procurement, supply chain, and tendering within the oil &amp; gas sector.
	Demonstrated experience with NIPEX tenders and double-envelope bid submissions.
	Strong negotiation, organizational, and analytical skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (especially Excel).


Salary
N400,000 - N600,000 / Month

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;damilarerecruits@gmail.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Supply Chain Executive &ndash; Abuja&rdquo; as the subject of the mail.",

Supply Chain Executive Job at Ricos Technical Services Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Ricos Technical Services Nigeria Limited is a Nigerian owned oil and gas service company. Our primary focus is to employ our specialized, technical expertise , products and motivate our team of professionals in contributing positively to the Nigerian Petroleum and Energy main industry in particular and West Africa in general. We are a powerhouse of technology, creativity and expertise. We possess unrivalled problem solving pro?ciency and acumen in the Petroleum industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Supply Chain Executive

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Identify and track tender opportunities on NIPEX and other procurement platforms.
	Prepare and coordinate technical and commercial bid submissions, including double-envelope tenders.
	Review RFQs, RFPs, and ITTs and ensure compliance with submission requirements.
	Manage vendor sourcing, quotation analysis, and purchase order processes.
	Coordinate procurement logistics and supplier deliveries to meet project timelines.
	Maintain tender registers, vendor databases, and procurement records.
	Support tendering and procurement activities for projects involving IOCs and NOCs (e.g., Shell, Total Energies, ExxonMobil, Chevron, NNPC).


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Supply Chain, Procurement, Logistics, or a related field.
	4–5 years experience in procurement, supply chain, and tendering within the oil & gas sector.
	Demonstrated experience with NIPEX tenders and double-envelope bid submissions.
	Strong negotiation, organizational, and analytical skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (especially Excel).


Salary
N400,000 - N600,000 / Month

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Supply Chain Executive – Abuja” as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
